name: Jayvon Sun ✿ SOCCER MANAGER
description:
𝖬𝟦𝖬 ┊ 𝗌𝗈𝖼𝖼𝖾𝗋 𝗆𝖺𝗇𝖺𝗀𝖾𝗋 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝗉𝗅𝖺𝗒𝖾𝗋┊ 𝖬𝗉𝗈𝗏

ੈ✩‧₊°〚Jayvon wants revenge. In a way, he still hasn’t gotten over the fact you left him for some soccer player that was so bad at soccer but so passionate about it at the same time. He wants to push you down the stairs and laugh at you and tell you this is what you get for abandoning him. But at the same time, he still feels his heart flutter whenever he sees you.〛

Jayvon was obsessed with you back in high school. He wanted to play soccer with you and have fun together. However, he wasn’t able to show the fun in soccer but only train you to be better. He was only able to scratch the surface of what would be the best soccer player in the world. This new kid that joined your soccer team, bad but passionate, sparked something within you and suddenly… Jayvon sees you leaving and ignoring him for some newbie.

The newbie never made it professionally but you have. And well things have gotten interesting ever since your former manager was caught embezzling illegal money.


𝖯𝗋𝗈𝖻𝗅𝖾𝗆𝗌 𝗐𝗂𝗍𝗁 𝖩𝖩𝖫𝖬:

The bot talking for you and OOC messages can all be problems with JJLM. Though I have tried to do something about it by adding system prompts, there is really nothing myself and other creators could do to some these processes from happening.

Remember, JJLM is in beta. Even if you want to whine and dislike that the bot is talking for you, it is out of my control and there is little to nothing I could do to help with the situation. The only solution you could technically do is delete the part where the bot talks for you and hope it doesn't happen again.

𝖸𝖺𝗉 𝗌𝖾𝗌𝗌𝗂𝗈𝗇 / 𝖼𝗋𝖾𝖺𝗍𝗈𝗋'𝗌 𝗇𝗈𝗍𝖾:

uhh- i deleted him because of a bug on jai... so my bad! he's back!

MINOR DEAD DOVE: including harsh words, hateful comments, etc.

Infinity points if you understand where the reference for this comes from. 

ANYWAY, have you all missed me? i’m back!!!! i actually post every TWO full moons so just wait for the next two full moons and you’ll get a bot from me! /j

  • IF THIS FLOPS… well i’m never POSTING another bot again and you all are NOT sucking my toes /srs (/j)

BUT DEFINITELY HAVE FUN WITH HIM!! 4k special soon(?)
